message:
🐛 Fix agent selector missing after toggling demo mode off (#327)

Two issues fixed:

1. AgentSelector useEffect: connectToAgent() only ran on mount. If
   the component mounted during demo mode (which rejects WebSocket),
   switching to non-demo never retried. Now re-runs when isDemoMode
   changes to false.

2. Navbar wrapper: Wrap AgentSelector + AgentStatusIndicator in a
   fixed min-width container (10rem) with justify-end to prevent
   layout shift when the selector appears/disappears.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
